mapper.select: SELECT user_id, currency, COALESCE(SUM(available_balance), 0) AS available_balance, COALESCE(SUM(frozen_balance), 0) AS frozen_balance, COALESCE(SUM(total_balance), 0) AS total_balance, COALESCE(SUM(withdraw_amount), 0) AS withdraw_amount, MIN(create_time) AS create_time, MAX(update_time) AS update_time FROM balance_bucket WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id, currency ORDER BY currency ASC

SELECT user_id, currency, COALESCE(SUM(available_balance), 0) AS available_balance, COALESCE(SUM(frozen_balance), 0) AS frozen_balance, COALESCE(SUM(total_balance), 0) AS total_balance, COALESCE(SUM(withdraw_amount), 0) AS withdraw_amount, MIN(create_time) AS create_time, MAX(update_time) AS update_time FROM balance_bucket
WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
GROUP BY user_id, currency ORDER BY user_id ASC, currency ASC

SELECT user_id, currency, COALESCE(SUM(available_balance), 0) AS available_balance, COALESCE(SUM(frozen_balance), 0) AS frozen_balance, COALESCE(SUM(total_balance), 0) AS total_balance, COALESCE(SUM(withdraw_amount), 0) AS withdraw_amount, MIN(create_time) AS create_time, MAX(update_time) AS update_time FROM balance_bucket WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = #{currency} GROUP BY user_id, currency
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO balance_bucket ( user_id, currency, bucket_no, available_balance, frozen_balance, total_balance, withdraw_amount, create_time, update_time, remark ) SELECT #{userId}, #{currency}, gs.bucket_no, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, NULL FROM generate_series(0, 15) AS gs(bucket_no) ON CONFLICT (user_id, currency, bucket_no) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, currency, bucket_no, available_balance, frozen_balance, total_balance, withdraw_amount, create_time, update_time, remark FROM balance_bucket WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = #{currency} ORDER BY bucket_no ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT user_id, currency, bucket_no, available_balance, frozen_balance, total_balance, withdraw_amount, create_time, update_time, remark FROM balance_bucket WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = #{currency} ORDER BY bucket_no ASC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO balance_bucket ( user_id, currency, bucket_no, available_balance, frozen_balance, total_balance, withdraw_amount, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{currency}, #{bucketNo}, #{amount}, 0, #{amount}, 0, #{now}, #{now}, NULL ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, currency, bucket_no) DO UPDATE SET available_balance = COALESCE(balance_bucket.available_balance, 0) + EXCLUDED.available_balance, total_balance = COALESCE(balance_bucket.total_balance, 0) + EXCLUDED.total_balance, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
